UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user's profile information within Homiefy, distinct from their authentication credentials, and linked to an external authentication system.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserProfile entity, typically provided by the external authentication system (e.g., Firebase UID).

firstName.description: The user's first name, provided during manual signup.

lastName.description: The user's last name, provided during manual signup.

email.description: The user's primary email address. This is used for identification and communication within the app, not for storing authentication credentials.

phoneNumber.description: The user's primary phone number, optionally provided during manual signup or later.

displayName.description: A user-friendly name displayed in the application, often a combination of first and last name, or a chosen alias.

familyId.description: Reference to the Family entity this user primarily belongs to. (Relationship: Family 1:N UserProfile)

role.description: The user's primary role within their family (e.g., 'Admin', 'Parent', 'Child'). This governs permissions and access within the family's financial context.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the user profile was last updated.

Family.title: Family
Family.description: Represents a family unit or household that collaboratively manages their shared finances within Homiefy.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Family entity.

name.description: The user-defined name for the family (e.g., 'The Smith Household', 'Our Shared Life').

description.description: An optional, brief description of the family unit or its financial goals.

currencyCode.description: The ISO 4217 currency code (e.g., 'USD', 'EUR', 'INR') used for all financial transactions and budgeting within this family.

adminUserId.description: Reference to the UserProfile entity who holds the primary administrative role for this family. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N Family)

customCategories.description: A list of custom spending categories created by this family.

createdAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the family entity was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp indicating when the family entity was last updated.

params.name: userId
params.description: The unique ID of the user, corresponding to Firebase Authentication UID.

definition.description: Stores details for each family unit.

params.name: familyId
params.description: The unique ID for a specific family unit.

definition.description: Stores monthly budget configurations and envelope balances for a family.
